programme.title: 60 Minutes Australia: Episode
programme.desc: 60 Minutes Australia provides investigative journalism and in-depth reporting on major national and international issues. It features exclusive interviews, real-life stories, and detailed coverage of current affairs and human interest topics. Through strong storytelling and on-the-ground reporting, it uncovers truths behind significant events and controversies.

programme.title: 60 Minutes
programme.desc: (NA) 30 years on from the Port Arthur massacre, Tara Brown reports on the lessons still being learnt from one of Australia's darkest days; Plus, Olympic champion Mollie O'Callaghan reveals the secret to swimming fast.

programme.title: 60 Minutes
programme.desc: (NA) Following the arrest of Ben Roberts-Smith, an SAS soldier speaks out; Plus, impressionable young Australian men under the spell of a dangerous phenomenon called looksmaxxing.

programme.title: 60 Minutes
programme.sub-title: Left to Die; Going it Alone
programme.desc: 60 Minutes Australia provides investigative journalism and in-depth reporting on major national and international issues. It features exclusive interviews, real-life stories, and detailed coverage of current affairs and human interest topics. Through strong storytelling and on-the-ground reporting, it uncovers truths behind significant events and controversies.
